caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, grey, textured hairstyle wearing glasses, black headphones, a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, and his mouth is open as if he is speaking. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing racks displaying apparel, including a yellow shirt with "LEE" visible. To the left and right of the man, on-screen graphics feature a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, though he slightly shifts his head and gestures with his hand, which briefly enters the frame from the left. The camera remains static, capturing a close-up shot of the man from the waist up as he speaks.
